title: ProgramMembership
description: Link between a registrant (individual or group) and a program. Backed by the Odoo model `g2p.program_membership`. Created by `enroll` and removed by `unenroll`.

partner_id.description: Many2one reference `[id, name]` to the enrolled registrant (`res.partner`).

program_id.description: Many2one reference `[id, name]` to the `g2p.program` the registrant is enrolled in.

enrollment_date.description: Date the registrant was enrolled in the program.

exit_date.description: Date the registrant exited the program, if applicable.
